commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Skill Workshop list/inspect derive stale status for pending create/update proposals from workspace target state, extracts stale marking for lifecycle paths, and adds service tests.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +68. Total +167 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main list/inspect return persisted `pending` status only, while the related report and PR proof show the stale target state after a manual install/deletion. I did not run a local reproducer because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the unused helper/comment drift and refresh focused validation without changing the product decision.

target.title: fix(skills): reconcile stale workshop proposals when target skill exists or is missing
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
